name: Fall Boys And Girls 2024
description: Fall Boys and Girls 2024 brings a thrilling twist to competitive gaming! Join colorful characters in a series of gravity-defying challenges, where agility and strategy are key. Compete against friends or AI in various mini-games, from obstacle courses to team challenges. With whimsical graphics and unpredictable gameplay, can you outwit, outlast, and outplay your way to victory in this dynamic multiplayer extravaganza? Website Developer <a href='https://www.bestcrazygames.com'>https://www.bestcrazygames.com</a>
instructions: wasd - walk button SPACE to jump
tags: Fall Boys, Fall Guys, Jumping, Mentolatux, Multiplayer, run, running, unity games, WebGL
